top_signals.title: Gold Steadies as US and Iran Prepare to Sign Interim Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Gold steadied after a four-day gain as the US and Iran prepared to sign an interim peace agreement that may ease global inflationary pressures arising from the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Third Iran-Linked Crude Carrier Crosses US Blockade Toward Asia
top_signals.summary: A third fully-loaded crude tanker has left the Iranian port of Chabahar and crossed the US blockade line heading toward Asia, just days before the planned signing of a ceasefire that will give Tehran the right to sell oil immediately.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FirstFT: Trump faces backlash over Iran deal
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter: Former executive sues Citi and investors pile into the dollar
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rupee Hits Six-Week High as India’s Inflow Measures Draw Demand
top_signals.summary: India’s rupee rallied to the strongest level in six weeks, fueling bets the currency can extend gains helped by the authorities’ steps this month to boost foreign-currency inflows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How Roku fits into Fox's future — and what investors are missing about the deal
top_signals.summary: Fox's stock dropped following its announcement that it will acquire Roku for $22 billion. Analysts still think it's a good deal.

top_signals.title: India temporarily blocks Telegram over medical exam cheating fears
top_signals.summary: Authorities said scammers previously exploited the feature by posting fake exam questions before the test and later replacing them with the real questions, making it look like they had leaked the exam in advance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
